---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a software defect
title: ""
labels: "type: bug"
---

## Summary

Describe the problem.

## Expected behavior

What should happen?

## Actual behavior

What currently happens?

## Steps to reproduce

Provide the exact steps needed to reproduce the issue, in order.

## Environment

State browser, device, operating system, application version, or environment.

## Impact

Who or what is affected?

## Screenshots or logs

Remove sensitive information before attaching.

## Acceptance criteria

State the conditions required to close the issue.
